name: Llama 3.2 1B Instruct
description: Meta's smallest Llama 3.2 model, highly efficient for low-end hardware.

name: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct
description: Meta's 3B model, offers great balance between speed and performance.

name: Phi-4 Mini Instruct
description: Microsoft's lightweight and powerful reasoning model.

name: Qwen 2.5 1.5B Instruct
description: Alibaba's highly capable small model, great for general tasks.

name: Mistral NeMo 12B Instruct
description: A powerful 12B model from Mistral and NVIDIA, great for complex logic.

name: Gemma 3 1B Instruct
description: Google's Gemma 3 1B — ultra-lightweight model for low-end hardware and edge devices. Surprisingly capable for its size.

name: Gemma 3 4B Instruct
description: Google's Gemma 3 4B — strong instruction-tuned model with excellent multilingual support and long context (128K).

name: Gemma 3 12B Instruct
description: Google's Gemma 3 12B — highly capable mid-size model with 128K context. Excellent reasoning, coding, and multilingual performance.

name: Gemma 3 27B Instruct
description: Google's Gemma 3 27B — the most powerful Gemma model. Top-tier reasoning and instruction following. Requires 16 GB+ VRAM or high-RAM CPU.

name: Gemma 4 E2B Instruct
description: Google's Gemma 4 E2B — ultra-lightweight edge model with multimodal support (text, vision, audio). Ideal for phones and low-end devices. 128K context.

name: Gemma 4 E4B Instruct
description: Google's Gemma 4 E4B — efficient on-device model with multimodal support (text, vision, audio). Great for laptops and fast local tasks. 128K context.

name: Gemma 4 26B-A4B Instruct (MoE)
description: Google's Gemma 4 26B Mixture-of-Experts — only 4B parameters active at inference for high speed with excellent quality. Text and vision support. 256K context.

name: Gemma 4 31B Instruct
description: Google's Gemma 4 31B — the most powerful Gemma 4 model. Dense architecture with top-tier reasoning and instruction following. Text and vision support. 256K context. Requires 20 GB+ VRAM or high-RAM CPU.

name: DeepSeek R1 Distill 7B
description: DeepSeek R1 reasoning distilled into 7B — delivers chain-of-thought reasoning far above its weight class. Best local reasoning model.

name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct
description: Meta's Llama 3.1 8B — strong all-round model with 128K context window. Excellent for general tasks and creative writing.

name: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B
description: Alibaba's dedicated coding model — state-of-the-art for code generation, debugging and explanation at the 7B scale. Pairs perfectly with the Code IDE.

name: Nemotron 3 Nano 4B
description: NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 Nano — compact Mamba-Transformer hybrid. Efficient and accurate at 4B parameters, ~18 tok/s on GPU. Best on CUDA; CPU-only may be unstable.
